name: Linh Ly
title: Storyteller

abilities.name: A Different Ending
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage equal to or greater than its current health, it may drain two (soulstone) to reduce that damage to 0 and deal the same amount of damage to the attacking model.

abilities.name: Head in the Clouds
abilities.text: Friendly models within 6" receive a (+) to Wp duels.

abilities.name: Spellbreaker
abilities.text: This model ignores the (magic) abilities of other models.

actions.name: Stories Unleashed
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may choose a (melee) action on an allied story model within 6". This action gains the text of the chosen action, if any.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Killer Late Fees
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores Demise and (fortitude) abilities.

actions.name: Storycraft
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Gift of Knowledge
triggers.text: An ally within 3" gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Jump Off the Page
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Allies within range move up to 3". This model may drain a (fortitude) to have an ally moved by this action declare the Interact action.

triggers.name: Restricted Section
triggers.text: Models moved by this action may gain an Adaptable token.

extraction_notes: Health bar shows numbered pips from 1 to 14, confirming 14 health total
